sutta: Monks, I know not of any other single person fraught with such loss to many folk such discomfort to many folk with such loss discomfort and sorrow to devas and mankind as ma kali that infatuated men just as monks at the river mouth one sets a fish trap to the discomfort suffering distress and destruction of many fish even so makali the infatuated infatuated man was born into the world meetings to be a man trapped for the discomfort suffering distress and destruction of many beings in this uttar commentry: the Buddha did not hesitate to speak badly on makali gosala putta one who had wrong view because he was leading many folk into the woeful planes and sometimes people think that the Buddha was such a nice man that he cannot criticize another person it's not true the Buddha is willing to benefit many people and speak out now even even uh to name somebody who was leading some people to have wrong views we were at.
